title: Nexatech – E-Commerce Platform
description: Scalable e-commerce system using Micro Frontend (Next.js Module Federation) and Microservice patterns, with independently deployable services (Auth, Blog, Host App). Features user authentication, product catalog, shopping cart, order management, blog module, and admin dashboard.

title: Chatly – Real-time Messaging Platform
description: Scalable real-time messaging platform supporting 1–1 and group chat with Spring Boot, WebSocket (STOMP), PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis. Mobile client built with React Native (Expo). Features real-time messaging, presence & typing indicators, media upload (S3), and read receipts.

title: Aurora Hotel Management
description: Enterprise-grade hotel management platform with AI-powered RAG chatbot using Google Gemini, RBAC with 70+ permissions, multi-branch management, booking system, and comprehensive analytics dashboard.

title: CodeHub Platform
description: Modern platform for developers to share, discover, and collaborate on code snippets with secure authentication, 70+ language support, real-time collaboration, and notification system.

title: NatureGrain E-commerce
description: Premium organic food e-commerce platform with product browsing, shopping cart, JWT authentication, admin dashboard for inventory and analytics.

title: SoleStore Footwear
description: Modern footwear e-commerce with product filtering, shopping cart, wishlist, order history, and efficient admin system.

title: HuongBien Restaurant
description: Desktop system for restaurant operations with table reservations, customer loyalty, billing, employee management, and revenue analytics.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Modern portfolio with React 19, TailwindCSS 4, Three.js animations, SEO optimization, and responsive design.
